title: tabernaemontana jasminiflora
intro: Tabernaemontana jasminiflora, also known as the yellow form of the Pinwheel Flower or Yellow Pinwheel, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana jasminiflora include its ability to reduce fever, treat various infections, and alleviate pain. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
